rule: Alert me when people are not wearing a hardhat in the last 15 minutes
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT dt.track_id FROM detection_tracks dt JOIN detection_classes dc ON dc.id = dt.detection_classes_id JOIN detection_observations obs ON obs.track_id = dt.track_id WHERE dc.app_config_id = 2 AND dc.name = 'Person' AND obs.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' GROUP BY dt.track_id HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'hardhat')::boolean = false) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'hardhat')::boolean = true)) sub

rule: Notify me if any person is detected without a mask in the last 45 minutes
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT dt.track_id FROM detection_tracks dt JOIN detection_classes dc ON dc.id = dt.detection_classes_id JOIN detection_observations obs ON obs.track_id = dt.track_id WHERE dc.app_config_id = 2 AND dc.name = 'Person' AND obs.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '45 minutes' GROUP BY dt.track_id HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'mask')::boolean = false) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'mask')::boolean = true)) sub

rule: Alert when people are seen without a safety vest in the past 2 hours
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT dt.track_id FROM detection_tracks dt JOIN detection_classes dc ON dc.id = dt.detection_classes_id JOIN detection_observations obs ON obs.track_id = dt.track_id WHERE dc.app_config_id = 2 AND dc.name = 'Person' AND obs.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours' GROUP BY dt.track_id HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'vest')::boolean = false) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'vest')::boolean = true)) sub

rule: Alert me when people are wearing a hardhat in the last 45 minutes

rule: Notify me if people with masks are detected in the last 45 minutes
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT dt.track_id FROM detection_tracks dt JOIN detection_classes dc ON dc.id = dt.detection_classes_id JOIN detection_observations obs ON obs.track_id = dt.track_id WHERE dc.app_config_id = 2 AND dc.name = 'Person' AND obs.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '45 minutes' GROUP BY dt.track_id HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'mask')::boolean = true) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'mask')::boolean = false)) sub

rule: Alert me when workers are wearing a safety vest in the past 2 hours
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT dt.track_id FROM detection_tracks dt JOIN detection_classes dc ON dc.id = dt.detection_classes_id JOIN detection_observations obs ON obs.track_id = dt.track_id WHERE dc.app_config_id = 2 AND dc.name = 'Person' AND obs.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours' GROUP BY dt.track_id HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'vest')::boolean = true) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'vest')::boolean = false)) sub

rule: Alert me when people don't have a hardhat and mask in the last 2 hours
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT dt.track_id FROM detection_tracks dt JOIN detection_classes dc ON dc.id = dt.detection_classes_id JOIN detection_observations obs ON obs.track_id = dt.track_id WHERE dc.app_config_id = 2 AND dc.name = 'Person' AND obs.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours' GROUP BY dt.track_id HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'hardhat')::boolean = false) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'hardhat')::boolean = true) AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'mask')::boolean = false) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'mask')::boolean = true)) sub

rule: Alert me if people are fully compliant with all PPE in the last 2 hours
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT dt.track_id FROM detection_tracks dt JOIN detection_classes dc ON dc.id = dt.detection_classes_id JOIN detection_observations obs ON obs.track_id = dt.track_id WHERE dc.app_config_id = 2 AND dc.name = 'Person' AND obs.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours' GROUP BY dt.track_id HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'hardhat')::boolean = true) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'hardhat')::boolean = false) AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'vest')::boolean = true) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'vest')::boolean = false) AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'mask')::boolean = true) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'mask')::boolean = false)) sub

rule: Alert when people are detected with no PPE at all in the last 45 minutes
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT dt.track_id FROM detection_tracks dt JOIN detection_classes dc ON dc.id = dt.detection_classes_id JOIN detection_observations obs ON obs.track_id = dt.track_id WHERE dc.app_config_id = 2 AND dc.name = 'Person' AND obs.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '45 minutes' GROUP BY dt.track_id HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'hardhat')::boolean = false) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'hardhat')::boolean = true) AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'vest')::boolean = false) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'vest')::boolean = true) AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'mask')::boolean = false) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'mask')::boolean = true)) sub

rule: Alert me when more than 20 people are detected in the last 2 hours
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dt.track_id) FROM detection_tracks dt JOIN detection_classes dc ON dc.id = dt.detection_classes_id WHERE dc.app_config_id = 2 AND dc.name = 'Person' AND dt.first_seen >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'

rule: Notify me if people have a hardhat and mask but no safety vest in the last 2 hours
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT dt.track_id FROM detection_tracks dt JOIN detection_classes dc ON dc.id = dt.detection_classes_id JOIN detection_observations obs ON obs.track_id = dt.track_id WHERE dc.app_config_id = 2 AND dc.name = 'Person' AND obs.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours' GROUP BY dt.track_id HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'hardhat')::boolean = true) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'hardhat')::boolean = false) AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'mask')::boolean = true) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'mask')::boolean = false) AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'vest')::boolean = false) > COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (obs.attributes->>'vest')::boolean = true)) sub

rule: Alert when people are wearing a safety vest but don't have a hardhat or mask in the last 45 minutes
